summary: All 8 steps of the filter-and-sort user story passed. Authentication worked via NextAuth CSRF flow. Four tasks were created with different statuses (TODO, DONE, IN_PROGRESS) and due dates (yesterday, tomorrow, 3 days, 1 week). Filtering by status=TODO correctly returned only TODO tasks, excluding DONE and IN_PROGRESS. Sorting by dueDate ascending returned all tasks in chronological order (Team lunch → Urgent report → Fix bug #42 → Quarterly review). Combined filter+sort (TODO + dueDate asc) correctly returned only the two TODO tasks in the right order (Urgent report before Quarterly review). Note: the database contained many pre-existing tasks from prior test runs, but filtering and sorting still worked correctly across all of them.

steps.verification: Session endpoint returned user with email alice@example.com and valid expiry

steps.action: POST /api/tasks with title 'Urgent report', status 'TODO', dueDate tomorrow
steps.verification: Response returned task with correct title, status TODO, dueDate 2026-04-02, and auto-generated id

steps.action: POST /api/tasks with title 'Team lunch', status 'DONE', dueDate yesterday
steps.verification: Response returned task with correct title, status DONE, dueDate 2026-03-31

steps.action: POST /api/tasks with title 'Quarterly review', status 'TODO', dueDate one week from now
steps.verification: Response returned task with correct title, status TODO, dueDate 2026-04-08

steps.action: POST /api/tasks with title 'Fix bug #42', status 'IN_PROGRESS', dueDate 3 days from now
steps.verification: Response returned task with correct title, status IN_PROGRESS, dueDate 2026-04-04

steps.action: GET /api/tasks?status=TODO to filter pending tasks only
steps.verification: All returned tasks have status TODO. 'Urgent report' and 'Quarterly review' present. 'Team lunch' (DONE) and 'Fix bug #42' (IN_PROGRESS) correctly excluded.

steps.action: GET /api/tasks?sortBy=dueDate&sortOrder=asc to sort all tasks by due date
steps.verification: All tasks sorted by dueDate ascending. Our 4 tasks appear in correct order: Team lunch (Mar 31) → Urgent report (Apr 2) → Fix bug #42 (Apr 4) → Quarterly review (Apr 8).
Only TODO tasks returned, sorted by dueDate asc. Urgent report (Apr 2) appears before Quarterly review (Apr 8). No DONE or IN_PROGRESS tasks present.

break_findings.description: Submitted task with empty string title
break_findings.result: Correctly rejected with error 'Title is required'

break_findings.description: Submitted task with missing title field entirely
break_findings.result: Correctly rejected with error 'Title is required'

break_findings.description: Submitted task with empty status string
break_findings.result: Task created successfully with status defaulting to TODO instead of rejecting. The empty status was silently replaced.
break_findings.fix_suggestion: Consider returning a validation error for empty status rather than silently defaulting, or document the default behavior explicitly

break_findings.result: Correctly rejected with error 'Title is required'

break_findings.description: Submitted XSS payload <script>alert(1)</script> as task title
break_findings.result: Task created and stored with raw script tag in title. No server-side sanitization.
break_findings.fix_suggestion: Sanitize or escape HTML in user inputs server-side to prevent stored XSS. Even if the frontend escapes on render, defense-in-depth requires server-side sanitization.

break_findings.description: Submitted SQL injection payload in title
break_findings.result: Task created safely — Prisma ORM parameterizes queries, preventing SQL injection. No vulnerability.
Task created successfully with unicode preserved. Good internationalization support.

break_findings.description: Submitted invalid date string 'not-a-date' as dueDate
break_findings.result: Correctly rejected with error 'Failed to create task'
break_findings.fix_suggestion: Return a more specific error message like 'Invalid date format' instead of generic 'Failed to create task'
